name: beefiker
description: Superloopy — a strict evidence loop harness that runs on both Claude Code and Codex from one repo.

plugins.name: superloopy
plugins.description: Strict evidence loop harness: repo-local loop state, success criteria, append-only ledgers, evidence-gated completion, plus skills (loop, research, frontend, clone) and a read-only/worker crew. Works on Claude Code and Codex from one repo.
